name: New England Sponge Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 tablespoon Grated orange or lemon rind
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg yolks until thick.
2. Gradually add sugar, fruit juice, and rind to the yolks.
3. Add hot water while stirring constantly.
4. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together.
5. Measure the sifted ingredients and fold them into the egg mixture.
6. Gently fold in stiffly whipped egg whites.
7. Pour batter into a well-oiled loaf pan.
8. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 40 minutes.
